response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack/web engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang experience, but the role requires deep embedded C, Linux kernel modification, network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X), and native-level Japanese — none of which are evidenced in the resume. C/C++ work is limited to a brief 2014-2015 stint at National Instruments, and there is no embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or networking-protocol background. The Japanese-language requirement alone is a hard blocker.
strengths: Long track record of shipping production software across multiple domains
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer tool
Strong testing/TDD discipline and Linux familiarity
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency indicated (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or kernel-modification experience
No exposure to required security/networking stack (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, switch SDKs)
